name: Tiago Ferreira
subtitle: PORTO LOCAL
description: Born in Bonfim, lives for FC Porto. Knows every tasca, tram route, and back alley in the city.

name: Catarina Sousa
subtitle: FOOD WRITER
description: Porto-born chef and food journalist. If she hasn't eaten there, it's not worth going.

name: Miguel Andrade
subtitle: NIGHT OWL
description: Architect by day, bar-hopper by night. He's been to every basement, rooftop, and converted warehouse in Porto.
